description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Phasar CI that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to build Phasar with different compilers, build types, and configurations. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, install Phasar and strategy dependencies, set up Swift 5.8.1, build Phasar with the specified compiler and flags, and run unit tests.
